data.markdown:
# Building prosperity for Illinois

The Illinois Innovation Network drives inclusive and integrated research, innovation and economic development across Illinois

![Student group working with a robot](https://iin.uillinois.edu/app/uploads/2025/09/IIN_Conference_092625_DN_1310-4x6v2.jpg)

## IIN Hubs

Hubs combine research, public-private partnerships, entrepreneurship and workforce training programs to spur inclusive economic development regionally and throughout the state


[See all hubs](https://iin.uillinois.edu/hubs/)

Business Innovation & Growth Center opened.

## Programs

Key initiatives driving inclusive and integrated economic development. [See all programs.](https://iin.uillinois.edu/programs/)

![Top finishers, sponsors and hosts from the 2024 Falling Walls Lab Illinois competition](https://iin.uillinois.edu/app/uploads/2025/09/Top3IIN-Reps_FallingWallsIL-091225_DN_1059-scaled.jpg)

- ## [IIN Fellows Program](https://iin.uillinois.edu/illinois-innovation-network-fellowship-program/)



The Illinois Innovation Network Fellows Program is a **career development program** designed **to support and recognize exceptional work** and projects by key IIN contributors.

- ## [Illinois Innovation Network Conference 2026: Powering Illinois’ Future Together](https://iin.uillinois.edu/conference/)



Southern Illinois University Edwardsville will host " **Illinois Innovation Network Conference 2026: Powering Illinois’ Future Together"** on October 22-23, 2026.

- ## [EnergySense Resilience Center](https://iin.uillinois.edu/energysense-resilience-center/)



EnergySense Resilience Center is an applied research center at the University of Illinois System that serves communities, businesses, and public agencies.
